'''Braised fork tarts''', also known as "'''''jimunee ronto pagona'''''" in the [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] [[Language/Legends|language]], were a type of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] dish created by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They contained thorns which had to be removed before consumption. The scholar [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] wrote about the tarts in his [[Book/Legends|book]] ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]''.

==Description==
Braised fork tarts, which in the [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] [[Language/Legends|language]] were named "''jimunee ronto pagona''", was a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] dish<ref name="GPBATG" /> considered a delicacy<ref name="Sc" /> and produced by members of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The dish contained thorns which had to be removed before consumption by Humans.<ref name="GPBATG" />

==History==
Despite the risk of the thorns, [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] scholar, recommended in [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Book/Legends|book]] the ''[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide]]'', that his readers should try the dish in the Hutt eateries of the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], should they be in the area. The book, which was released in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], also included the Huttese translation of the dishes name in the Huttese language section, in which Baobab listed the food amongst his favorite Hutt dishes. He claimed that Hutt cuisine, including the tarts, were expensive. He advised they be eaten causally in a random order using gloves, but wrote that utensils were optional.<ref name="GPBATG" /> Alongside other Hutt delicacies, the dish was served<ref name="Sc" /> in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]<ref name="EC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> at a feast held by the Hutt [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto]] in his [[Popara's penthouse|penthouse]] on the planet [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]].<ref name="Sc" />

==Behind the scenes==
Braised fork tarts were first mentioned in the [[2001]] book [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']], which was written by [[Ben Burtt]].<ref name="GPBATG" /> In [[2012]], they made their first appearance in the novel [[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']], which was written by [[Jeff Grubb]] as the novelized version of the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure ''[[Tempest Feud]]''.<ref name="Sc" />
